name: Huskar
description: Those who are given more in life must not cling to it but risk it all at every moment.

abilities.name: Blood Magic
abilities.description: Huskar does not have mana. Mana cost of all sources are converted to health cost for the Sacred Warrior.

abilities.name: Inner Fire
abilities.description: In a fiery rage, Huskar pushes all nearby enemy units away to a fixed distance, silences and damages them. Radius: 500. Damage: 110/180/250/320. Silence Duration: 1.5/2/2.5/3 (2.25/2.75/3.25/3.75). Max Knockback Distance: 400. Min Knockback Duration: 0.4. Cooldown: 17/15/13/11.

abilities.name: Burning Spear
abilities.description: Ignites his spears aflame with his health, dealing damage over time with his regular attack. Multiple attacks will stack additional damage. Grants additional range when manually casting the ability. Cast Range: 400. Damage per Second: 5/10/15/20 (10/15/20/25). Max Health as Damage per Second: 0.5%. Duration: 9 (31). Active Cast Range: 450. Cooldown: 0.

abilities.name: Berserker's Blood
abilities.description: Huskar's injuries feed his power, giving increased attack speed, magic resistance and health regeneration based on missing health. Grants health regeneration bonus based on a percentage of Huskar's strength. Applies a Basic Dispel on Huskar. After a short delay, the ability health cost is applied as a heal, along with a bonus for each debuff dispelled this way.

abilities.name: Life Break
abilities.description: Applies all ability effects on target, but does not damage it. Taunts the affected enemy unit to attack Huskar. Increases cast range. Cast Range: 550 (800). Current Health as Damage: 32%/38%/44% (38%/44%/50%). Move Speed Slow: 60%. Attack Speed Slow: 60/100/140. Slow Duration: 3/4/5 (5/6/7). Taunt Duration: (3). Cooldown: 16/14/12 (11/9/7).
